creator: joshruehlig@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 172544
owncloud diff

I realized in my previous bug report linked, the fix was not complete.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208311

The attached diff fully solves this issue by making the necessary files writable, not just by root but by owncloud's user (by default 'www') and by group members to follow the convention of other writable folders like /data and /config.
